headline: How The Halliburton (HAL) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Targets And Fair Value Estimates
summary: Halliburton’s refreshed valuation work now points to a fair value of US$41.64, up from US$39.30, reflecting the latest modeling of the stock’s potential. This shift sits alongside a busy period of analyst activity, with several firms lifting price targets by US$1 to US$8, a new upgrade, and at least one cut, all shaping how you might think about the current risk and reward. Read on to see what is driving these moves and how you can track the evolving narrative from here. Analyst Price Targets...

headline: Transocean Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Revenues Beat, Both Up Y/Y
summary: RIG expects second-quarter 2026 contract drilling revenues in the range of $930-$970 million and fleet-wide revenue efficiency of 96.5%.
